summary: Restored factory lifecycle integrity. Backfilled 6 missing completion records (S8-S13) from verified git commit evidence. Implemented FI-6 (no progression without completion) in validate.ts — validation now fails if any started packet lacks a completion while newer packets have completions. Added factory:complete helper script that runs build/lint/tests and writes a truthful completion record. Updated factory README documenting FI-6. All 17 packets now have completions. Derived state shows 17 accepted, 8 audit-pending.

verification.notes: 618 tests pass (kernel: 227, module-loader: 146, runtime-host: 221, provider-anthropic: 14, module-exec: 10). FI-6 enforcement verified: removing s10 completion triggers 'FI-6 violation' error. factory:validate PASS with 18 packets, 18 completions.
